rows.reference: Upright abdominal X-ray.PARAGRAPH Multiple air-fluid levels are observed in the loops of the small intestine, a finding suspicious for small bowel obstruction. NEWLINE  In the right upper quadrant, round calcifications are noted, possibly gallstones. NEWLINE  No intra-abdominal calcifications are observed. NEWLINE  Fecal loading of the colon. NEWLINE  No significant findings from the visualized skeleton.

medasrjs.text: Upright abdominal x-ray. Multiple air-fluid levels are observed in the loops of the small intestine. A finding suspicious for small bowel obstruction. In the right upper quadrant, round calcifications are noted, possibly gallstones. No intra-abdominal calcifications are observed. Fecal loading of the colon. No significant findings from the visualized skeleton.

rows.reference: DOTAREM FL INJ 20 ml 13 cc lot no. t100cPARAGRAPH Results NEWLINE  Compared to the previous MRI on 30/07/2021.PARAGRAPH The left pterional meningioma remains stable in size, measuring 19 x 12 x 14 mm  - LxWxH -  and is partially calcified.PARAGRAPH Fazekas grade 1 leukoaraiosis.PARAGRAPH No abnormal diffusion restriction.PARAGRAPH

medasrjs.text: Do t a r e m FL 20 mL 13 cubic cm lot number T100 c.[RESULTS] Compared to the previous MRI on life 30 of 2021. The left terional meningioma remains stable in size measuring 19x12x14 mm length by width by height and is partially calcified. Aak is grade one leukriosis. No abnormal diffusion restriction.
